blended.narrative: Mount Snow is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 368 ft. Looking ahead, 15 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
